titleStmt.title: SII 10.480: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 480. (A.R. No. 45 of 1909.) ON A SLAB IN THE COURTYARD OF THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀMBĀ IN THE BED OF THE TANK AT THE SAME VILLAGE. Ś. 1218. (Durmukhi)

summary.p: States that those engaged in the sale of salt, assigned to the temple of Tripurādēvi, certain duties on sales for the merit of Kākatīya Pratāpa-Rudradēva, his general, Rudradēva, and his chief minister Pōchirāju Peddirāju. The portion of the inscription fixing the scale of duties assigned is not quite intelligible.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīśālīprathamānaratnamakuṭasphū¨rjjat
nudhādīdhiti ssū¨ryyātītapunaprabhā
vilasitā trailōkyarakṣākarī . baṁdhūkapra
savāruṇā bhagavatī saubhāgyasaṁpat pradā
pāyā dva stripurāpurāridayitā dāri
dryavidrāvaṇī . pāyā dva stripurāpura
ṁdaramukhā śēṣāmarōdyat prabhāvyāptāśāṁtaki
rīṭakōṭivilasanmāṇikyabhāsvadyutā Atyaṁtapravikāsitāṁghri
kamalā nityaṁ niśāṭīvṛtā cittē yōgijanasyakalpitanijāvā
sā vilāsālayā . svasti śrī śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1218 Agu
nēṁṭi du¨rmukhisaṁvatsara bhādrapada śū bu . svasti śrīmanmahā
maṁḍalēśvara kākatiyyapratāparudradēva mahārāju
lakūnu svasti śrīmanmahārāyasakalasēnādhipatiru
dradēvaniṁgārikini svasti śrīmanmahāpradhāni sa¨rvādhi
kāri pōcirājupeddirājuṁgārikiṁ buṇyamugānū
nu lōkahitamugānūnu Ubhayanānādēśipekkaṁḍrū
nu Uppusuṁka[ma ]śeḍikaraṇālūṁ dī¨rparulūnu ko
lakāṁḍrūnu śrītripurādēviki Aṁgaraṁgabhōgālakai Icci
na Āyamu suṁkamuvallanu Aidu śēśipeṟukalu
śa[E ?]ḍlu śa[Ē ?]ṭaviṭanu daraṇamu śēśi mānyagāṁḍru mānyamu mā
na namāḍabaḍi cinnamu Īkramāna Iccuvāru . Iṁtavaṭṭu
dha¨rmmamu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigānu Ubhayanānādēśipe
kkaṁḍrūnuṁ jelliṁpuvāru Īdha¨rmmunaku Evvarēni lōnugā
nivāru ghōranarakālaṁ baḍuvāru . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇya
ṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavē
t . sāmā nyōyaṁ dha¨rmmasētu [¨r*]nnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō
bhavadbhiḥ . sa¨rvvā nētān bhāvinaḥ pā¨rtthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhū
yō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ .
Digital edition of SII 10.480 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
